title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage GGUF models locally with a single binary.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from any Python script.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same features as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that turns any Ollama model into a drop-in LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui (Open WebUI)
summary: Full-featured, self-hosted web interface for Ollama with chat history, RAG, user auth, and plugins.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example that ingests PDFs and chats over them using Ollama embeddings.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as a GitHub-Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps Ollama with fuzzy finder chat history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose snippets for running Ollama containerized with CUDA support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring-Starter and Micronaut integrations.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting chat, completions, and embeddings with async enumerable streams.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app for chatting with Ollama models offline; macOS/Windows/Linux builds.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration that uses Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama replies in servers; supports slash commands and custom system prompts.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers threads using local Ollama models; deploys via one Docker container.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Chat with Ollama” pane and can summarize selected notes.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing JavaScript/TypeScript bindings for the Ollama API.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official PyPI package for Python developers to integrate Ollama models into apps.

title: r/ollama - Local LLaMA models with Ollama discussion
summary: Active subreddit where users share model files, troubleshoot GPU issues, and showcase integrations.
